hypothesis: The best model so far is exp_0029 with num_leaves=256 (WRMSSE=0.94669). Testing whether reducing learning_rate from 0.05 to 0.03 with more estimators (800 max) improves performance, as lower learning rate with early stopping often finds better optima. All other hyperparameters unchanged from exp_0029 (num_leaves=256, min_child_samples=50, lambda_l2=0.1). The DOW seasonal features and full feature set from exp_0029 are preserved.
